## Description

Brief summary of the change and why it is needed.

## Related Issue

Fixes # (issue number)

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that changes existing behavior)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Code refactor (no functional change)

## Testing Performed

Describe the manual testing you performed:

- [ ] Visible tab capture on a standard web page
- [ ] Full-page capture on a page taller than the viewport
- [ ] Area selection with valid rectangle
- [ ] Area selection cancelled with Escape
- [ ] Capture on restricted URLs (should show error)
- [ ] Keyboard shortcut for each mode
- [ ] Context menu for each mode
- [ ] Format switch (PNG, JPEG, WebP) with download verification
- [ ] Quality slider changes persist across popup reopens
- [ ] Copy to clipboard produces a pasteable image
- [ ] Service worker console free of unhandled errors

## Files Changed

List the files modified in this PR and a one-line description of each change.

## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the project's coding standards
- [ ] I have tested the changes manually as described above
- [ ] I have updated documentation if interfaces or behavior changed
- [ ] No new files contain secrets, credentials, or internal references
- [ ] No commented-out code or debugging artifacts remain
- [ ] The extension loads in Chrome without errors
